ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: 💾 Choose a Folder to save the selected Banner in your vault
ast.target: 💾 选择一个文件夹以将选定的横幅保存到您的保险库中

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
If you set a default value in settings it will be pre-filled above.
Select any folder in your vault to continue.
ast.target:
如果您在设置中设置了默认值，它将预先填充在上方。
选择您保险库中的任意文件夹以继续。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
\u{1F62D} Failed to generate image, please try again.

Note that NSFW images are not allowed. You were not charged for this request.
ast.target:
\u{1F62D} 图像生成失败，请重试。

请注意，不允许生成 NSFW 图像。您未因此次请求被收费。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: You do not have an active Pixel Banner Plus account. Please Signup for Free or connect to your account in Settings to generate awesome banners with AI 🤖.
ast.target: 您没有活跃的 Pixel Banner Plus 账户。请 免费注册 或在设置中连接您的账户，以使用 AI 🤖 生成精彩的横幅。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: 💾 Choose a Folder to save the selected Icon in your vault
ast.target: 💾 选择一个文件夹以将选定的图标保存到您的保险库中

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If disabled, the saved image will be saved to your vault, but not applied to the current note.
ast.target: 如果禁用，保存的图像将保存到您的保险库，但不会应用到当前笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the API provider for fetching images
ast.target: 选择用于获取图像的API提供商

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Configure settings for images fetched from API. These settings apply when using keywords to fetch random images.
ast.target: 配置从API获取的图像的设置。这些设置在使用关键词获取随机图像时适用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a pin icon on random banner images that allows saving them to your vault. Once pinned, your frontmatter will be updated to use the local image instead of the API image.
ast.target: 在随机横幅图像上显示一个固定图标，允许将其保存到您的保险库。固定后，您的前置信息将更新为使用本地图像而非API图像。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the default filename for pinned images.
ast.target: 设置固定图像的默认文件名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a refresh icon on random banner images that allows fetching a new random image.
ast.target: 在随机横幅图像上显示一个刷新图标，允许获取新的随机图像。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the size of the image - (API only)

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the orientation of the image - (API only)

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter the number of random images to fetch (3-50) - (API only)
ast.target: 输入要获取的随机图像数量（3-50） - （仅限API）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter a comma-separated list of default keywords to be used when no keyword is provided in the frontmatter, or when the provided keyword does not return any results. - (API only)
ast.target: 输入一个逗号分隔的默认关键词列表，当未在前置信息中提供关键词，或提供的关键词未返回任何结果时使用。 - （仅限API）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Randomly select an image from a specified folder each time the note loads
ast.target: 每次加载笔记时从指定文件夹中随机选择一张图像

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder containing images to randomly select from
ast.target: 包含用于随机选择的图像的文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Apply banner only to direct children of the folder
ast.target: 仅将横幅应用于文件夹的直接子项

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the banner selector icon in the top-left corner of notes
ast.target: 在笔记左上角显示横幅选择器图标

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the opacity of the banner selector icon in the top-left corner (0-100)
ast.target: 设置左上角横幅选择器图标的不透明度（0-100）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which flag color to use for the banner selector
ast.target: 选择横幅选择器使用的旗帜颜色

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default folder where Banners will be saved
ast.target: 保存横幅的默认文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set a default folder path to filter images when opening the Select Image modal
ast.target: 设置打开选择图像模态框时用于筛选图像的默认文件夹路径

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set a default folder path to filter images when selecting a banner icon image
ast.target: 设置一个默认文件夹路径，用于在选择横幅图标图像时筛选图片

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically open the Targeting Modal after selecting a banner image or icon
ast.target: 选择横幅图像或图标后，自动打开定位模态框

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the maximum width for banner images (100-2560 pixels)
ast.target: 设置横幅图像的最大宽度（100-2560像素）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the horizontal position of the image (0-100)

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the vertical position of the image (0-100)

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the default vertical position where the content starts (in pixels)
ast.target: 设置内容开始的默认垂直位置（以像素为单位）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set how the banner image should be displayed
ast.target: 设置横幅图像的显示方式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable image repetition when "Contain" is selected
ast.target: 当选择“包含”时启用图像重复

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the default height of the banner image (0-1280 pixels)
ast.target: 设置横幅图像的默认高度（0-1280像素）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the default fade effect for the banner image (-300 to 100)
ast.target: 设置横幅图像的默认淡入淡出效果（-300至100）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the default fade in animation duration for the banner image (0-1000 milliseconds)
ast.target: 设置横幅图像的默认淡入动画持续时间（0-1000毫秒）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the default border radius of the banner image (0-50 pixels)
ast.target: 设置横幅图像的默认边框半径（0-50像素）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the gap between the banner and the window edges (0-50 pixels)
ast.target: 设置横幅与窗口边缘之间的间距（0-50像素）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the default inline title color for all banners
ast.target: 为所有横幅设置默认的内联标题颜色

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hide titles of embedded notes if Obsidian's "Show inline title" setting is enabled
ast.target: 如果Obsidian的“显示内联标题”设置已启用，则隐藏嵌入笔记的标题

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show banners in popover note previews
ast.target: 在弹出笔记预览中显示横幅

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show an icon to view the banner image in full screen
ast.target: 显示一个图标，用于全屏查看横幅图像

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the format for the banner property value.
ast.target: 设置横幅属性值的格式。

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: name
ast.target: ✨ 使用 AI 生成横幅

ast.name: name
ast.target: 🏪 打开像素横幅 Plus 合集

ast.name: name
ast.target: 📰 设置横幅图标文本/表情符号

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 输入表情符号和/或文本...

ast.name: text
ast.source: After each update you'll be prompted with the release notes. You can disable this in the plugin settings General tab.
ast.target: 每次更新后，系统会向您显示版本说明。您可以在插件设置的“通用”选项卡中禁用此功能。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter a name for the media file.
ast.target: 请输入媒体文件的名称。

ast.name: text
ast.source: How would you like to pin this image?
ast.target: 您希望如何固定此图像？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Download and save the image to your vault. The image will be stored locally and referenced by file path.
ast.target: 下载图像并保存到您的保险库。图像将存储在本地，并通过文件路径引用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ✓ Image remains available even if original source is removed
ast.target: ✓ 即使原始来源被移除，图像仍可用

ast.name: text
ast.source: Save only the image URL to frontmatter. The image will be loaded from the original source each time.
ast.target: 仅将图像 URL 保存到前置元数据。图像每次都将从原始来源加载。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ✓ No storage space used in vault
ast.target: ✓ 不占用保险库存储空间

ast.name: text
ast.target: ⚠ 需要互联网连接才能显示

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add a banner first to enable customization options.
ast.target: 请先添加横幅以启用自定义选项。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You have already downloaded this image. Do you want to download it again?
ast.target: 您已下载过此图像。是否要再次下载？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Please confirm you want to delete "IMGDESCRIPTION" from your AI Generated Banner History. This will not delete any images you have previously downloaded to your vault.
ast.target: 请确认您要从 AI 生成横幅历史记录中删除 \"IMGDESCRIPTION\"。这不会删除您之前下载到保险库中的任何图像。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Failed to load AI banner generator. Please try again later.
ast.target: 加载AI横幅生成器失败。请稍后再试。

ast.name: text
ast.source: TIP ⇢ Type a few words and then press the "🌱 GROW IDEA" button to transform your basic idea into something special! Select a Model and then click "✨ Generate Banner".
ast.target: 提示 ⇢ 输入几个词，然后点击“🌱 生成创意”按钮，将你的基本想法转化为特别的内容！选择一个模型，然后点击“✨ 生成横幅”。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No AI models available. Please try again later.
ast.target: 没有可用的AI模型。请稍后再试。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You have no remaining banner tokens 😭. Please purchase more tokens to generate a banner. Your previous banners (if any) will still be available for download below.
ast.target: 你的横幅代币已用完😭。请购买更多代币来生成横幅。你之前的横幅（如果有）仍然可以在下方下载。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click an image to download and use as a banner. These downloads are always FREE as you have already paid to generate them. Images older than one month are subject to deletion from our servers.
ast.target: 点击图片即可下载并用作横幅。这些下载始终免费，因为你已经为生成它们付费了。超过一个月的图片可能会从我们的服务器上删除。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select an image from your vault or upload a new one.
ast.target: 从你的图库中选择一张图片或上传一张新的。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select an image to use as a banner icon.
ast.target: 选择一张图片用作横幅图标。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter a direct URL to an image file (jpg, png, gif, etc.).
ast.target: 输入图片文件（jpg, png, gif等）的直接URL。

ast.name: text
ast.source: \u{1F62D} Failed to load icon categories. Please try again later.
ast.target: \\u{1F62D} 加载图标分类失败。请稍后再试。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 📰 设置横幅图标表情符号和文本

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use the form below to optionally set an emoji and/or text as this note's Banner Icon. Leave the value blank and click the "Update Banner Icon" button to clear any existing banner icon if it exists.
ast.target: 使用下面的表单可选择性地设置一个表情符号和/或文本作为此笔记的横幅图标。将值留空并点击“更新横幅图标”按钮可清除任何现有的横幅图标（如果存在）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Failed to load store. Please try again later.
ast.target: 加载商店失败。请稍后再试。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Browse the Pixel Banner Plus Collection to find the perfect banner for your needs. Banner Token prices are displayed on each card below (FREE or 1 Banner Token). Previous purchases will be listed as FREE.
ast.target: 浏览像素横幅Plus收藏集，找到适合你需求的完美横幅。横幅代币价格显示在下方每张卡片上（免费或1个横幅代币）。之前的购买将显示为免费。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Failed to load categories. Please try again later.
ast.target: 加载分类失败。请稍后再试。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Failed to load images. Please try again.

ast.name: text
ast.source: Error displaying images: Invalid data format
ast.target: 显示图片出错：数据格式无效

ast.name: text
ast.source: 🌐 Optionally select which 3rd party API provider to use for displaying random images.
ast.target: 🌐 可选择用于显示随机图片的第三方API提供商。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter your Pexels API key. Get your API key from
ast.target: 输入你的Pexels API密钥。从以下地址获取你的API密钥：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter your Pixabay API key. Get your API key from
ast.target: 输入你的Pixabay API密钥。从以下地址获取你的API密钥：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter your Flickr API key. Get your API key from
ast.target: 输入您的 Flickr API 密钥。请从以下地址获取您的 API 密钥：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter your Unsplash API key (Access Key). Get your API key from
ast.target: 输入您的 Unsplash API 密钥（访问密钥）。请从以下地址获取您的 API 密钥：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add keyword(s) to the banner frontmatter to display random API images matching the keywords.
ast.target: 在横幅的 frontmatter 中添加关键词，以显示与关键词匹配的随机 API 图像。

ast.name: text
ast.source: 🗃️ Configure banner settings for specific folders. These settings will override the default settings for all notes in the specified folder.
ast.target: 🗃️ 为特定文件夹配置横幅设置。这些设置将覆盖指定文件夹中所有笔记的默认设置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: 🗺️ Customize the frontmatter field names used for Pixel Banner. You can define multiple names for each field, separated by commas. Field names can only contain letters, numbers, dashes, and underscores. Example: "banner, pixel-banner, header_image" could all be used as the banner field name.
ast.target: 🗺️ 自定义用于 Pixel Banner 的 frontmatter 字段名称。您可以为每个字段定义多个名称，用逗号分隔。字段名称只能包含字母、数字、破折号和下划线。例如：\"banner, pixel-banner, header_image\" 都可以用作横幅字段名称。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Purchase tokens to download Banners from the Store or Generate them with AI ✨
ast.target: 购买代币以从商店下载横幅，或使用 AI ✨ 生成它们。
